svg.title: The Compression Field
svg.desc: This is not an image. It is a field. A semantic gravity well where concepts bend space around them — their frequency becomes mass, their entropy becomes geometry, their relations become elastic force. Interact: drag nodes, click to morph, hover to sense gravity, double-click background to reset. Built as a living mathematical object.

g.text: SEMANTIC GRAVITY · CURVATURE MANIFOLD · LIVING STRUCTURE
DRAG · CLICK · HOVER · DBL-CLICK TO RESET
